sections.paragraph:
verb ער

to awake, wake up

verb לערות (>>לְעָרוֹת)

to pour, empty; strip; destroy

verb עורה

be joined, glued; rooted, based; involved

verb להתערות

be joined, glued; rooted, based; involved

verb להעיר

to wake; rouse, stir up; comment, remark, observe

verb להערות

to strip; empty, pour out

verb הוער

be awakened; commented on

verb לערות (>>עירה)

to transfuse, infuse, pour, empty

verb לערות (>>עירה)

to strip; destroy

adjective

awake, alert, up, wakeful, keen, waking, astir; vigilant, watchful

feminine noun עיר

city, town, township, burg
